---
title: "Molecular profiling of glioblastoma: spatial comparison against control brain tissue"
author: "Chiara Falleroni & Luca Marzilli"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: 
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    number_sections: true
    fig_width: 8
    fig_height: 6
  pdf_document:
    toc: False
    number_sections: true
    fig_width: 8
    fig_height: 6
    highlight: tango
    df_print: kable
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    # chiedi a chiara se le piaciono gli output inline.
    wrap: 80
    # chunk_output_type: console 
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


\newpage
\tableofcontents
\newpage

# Biological context and study objectives 

# Experimental design 

# Preprocessing 

# Pre-normalization EDA 

# Data normalization and quality control

# Post-normalization EDA

# Identification of DEGs

# Gene set analysis

# ALTRO è PUNTI BONUSSSS

# Conclusions
